name: subject-not-string-throws
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :StartsWithSubjectNotString :message "startsWith expects String at position 1, got Number" :operand "startsWith" :position 1 :expectedType "String" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "startsWith" :args [{ :qlang/kind :StringLit :value "x" :text "\"x\"" :location { :start { :offset 16 :line 1 :column 17 } :end { :offset 19 :line 1 :column 20 } } }] :effectful false :text "startsWith(\"x\")" :location { :start { :offset 5 :line 1 :column 6 } :end { :offset 20 :line 1 :column 21 } } } :input 42 } :trail [] }

name: prefix-not-string-throws
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :StartsWithPrefixNotString :message "startsWith expects String at position 2, got Number" :operand "startsWith" :position 2 :expectedType "String" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "startsWith" :args [{ :qlang/kind :NumberLit :value 42 :text "42" :location { :start { :offset 18 :line 1 :column 19 } :end { :offset 20 :line 1 :column 21 } } }] :effectful false :text "startsWith(42)" :location { :start { :offset 7 :line 1 :column 8 } :end { :offset 21 :line 1 :column 22 } } } :input "hi" } :trail [] }
